items.title: PraisonAI CVE-2026-44338 Auth Bypass Targeted Within Hours of Disclosure
items.summary:
Threat actors have been observed attempting to exploit a recently disclosed security vulnerability in PraisonAI, an open-source multi-agent orchestration framework, within four hours of public disclosure.

items.title: KongTuke hackers now use Microsoft Teams for corporate breaches
items.summary: Initial access broker KongTuke has moved to Microsoft Teams for social engineering attacks, taking as little as five minutes to gain persistent access to corporate networks. [...]
